title: Prilep, Pelagonia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Prilep, Pelagonia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Prilep is a city in Pelagonia with a population of 66,000. A city in southern North Macedonia known as the ‘City of Tobacco’ for its tobacco production, the Marko’s Towers fortress, and the Treskavec Monastery.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
